violations.text: At the time of inspection, the establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection (the current Registered Food Safety Manager is covering 2 stores). Per the Manager on site, Food Safety Course is scheduled to be completed, and Application for Food Safety Manager will be submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Establishment is using time for holding hot chicken without an approval. Per PIC, chicken is cooked (fried) and held for no longer than 30 minutes before being reheated in frier for service or discarded. Guidance, Application, and Log Sheets provided to PIC at time of previous inspection. To be submitted to RIDOH Supervisor as soon as possible. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

At the time of inspection, no person certified in food safety was on site as needed at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per the Person in Charge (PIC), a ffod safety course is scheduled to be completed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

At the time of inspection, The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Per the Manager on site, Food Safety Course is scheduled to be completed, and Application for Food Safety Manager will be submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Chicken Wings and Mozzarella sticks were observed held at 45 to 49 degrees Fahrenheit in the small prep unit in the front service area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Establishment is using time for holding hot chicken without a approval. Per PIC, chicken is cooked (fried) and held for no longer than 30 minutes before being reheated in frier or discarded. Guidance, Application, and Log Sheets provided to PIC. To be submitted to RIDOH Supervisor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per observation during inspection, chicken wings were placed in the walk-in refrigerator in a covered container greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods were discussed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The small prep cooler in the front service area was observed holding an ambient temperature of 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is not to be used for storage of Time/temperature control for safety foods until serviced/repaired and properly maintaining ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. (Per the PIC, unit is due for service.) New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The upstairs storage/office area was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue and old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and to aid in the current pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The following food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The ice machine had an accumulation of biofilm. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice and turned ice machine off to be serviced 2) The vegetable slicer had food debris. Slicer was moved to three bay sink to be sanitized Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of rodent droppings observed in back prep area and second floor storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

A dead mouse was observed in the second floor storage area. Dead or trapped birds, insects, rodents, and other pests shall be removed from control devices and the PREMISES at a frequency that prevents their accumulation, decomposition, or the attraction of pests. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Several bags of bread were observed kept in close proximity to hand washing sink in front service line. Food must be protected from miscellaneous sources of contamination during preperation, storage, and/or display. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The folowing equipment were osberved in poor repair: 1) A knife was observed with a chipped blade 2) The vegetable slicer was observed with a bent blade PIC instructed to remove this equipment from use Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

The right handle of the hand sink faucet (located in near the ice machine) was observed in poor repair. The hand washing sink must be able to dispense both hot and cold water. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

The following areas of the phsycial facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The floors throughout the establishment had an accumulation of rodent droppings 2) The ceiling area above the front service line had an accumulation of dust 3) The fan in the walk-in freezer had dust New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

The handsinks cold water handle was observed in poor repair. The handle would not allow for cold water to flow out of the faucet. The prep unit was observed iced over and with an ambient temperature of 45 degrees. Unit was taken out of service. PIC placed service order at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
The non-food contact surfaces underneath the grill have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
Stagnant water was observed in a bucket by the soda storage area. Non sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
Mouse droppings were observed on the floor around the soda storage area. Establishment to increase cleaning frequency. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023
